title: What's new in v2.65.0
content:
Features:
- Tileset/tilemap auto new tiles
- Duplicate file button
- Swap mode for tileset reordering

Enhancements:
- Resizable dithering presets
- Tools presets added to the toolbox squeeze action
- Added line/shape mode switching to the gesture pad and the joystick
- Holding the tileset button to temporarily hide the grid
- Other minor UI enhancements

Fixes:
- Move tool's rare undo/redo glitch
- Tilemap grid color not being saved
- Other minor issues
